mapper.sql: shareId, userId, shareType, content, imgUrl,linkUrl, shareChannel, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into share
shareId,
userId,
shareType,
content,
imgUrl,
linkUrl,
shareChannel,
createdDate,
#{shareId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{shareType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{linkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{shareChannel,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update share
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
shareType = #{shareChannel,jdbcType=TINYINT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shareChannel = #{shareChannel,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where shareId = #{shareId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update share set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, shareType = #{shareType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, linkUrl = #{linkUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shareChannel = #{shareChannel,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where shareId = #{shareId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
